items.title: Take-Two CEO Confirms GTA 6 Physical Disc Edition for Nov 19, 2026
items.summary: Take-Two CEO Strauss Zelnick confirmed Grand Theft Auto VI will ship with a physical disc edition on November 19, 2026. A dataminer recently pulled GTA 6's live Xbox Product ID and Title ID from Microsoft's backend, confirming the title is now provisioned on console storefronts.

items.title: Take-Two Reaffirms Nov 19 Date in Q3 Earnings Report
items.summary: Take-Two's fiscal Q3 2026 earnings report listed GTA VI for PS5 and Xbox Series X|S on November 19, 2026, with no new delay. The company projects record Net Bookings in Fiscal 2027.

items.title: Rockstar's Launch Marketing Set to Begin This Summer
items.summary: Take-Two told staff that execution through Fiscal 2026 has been strong, with Rockstar's launch marketing push beginning this summer, hinting more trailers and pre-orders are imminent.

items.title: Take-Two Sets May 21 Earnings Call, a Crucial Date for Fans
items.summary: Take-Two scheduled its next earnings call for May 21, 2026, the moment fans expect to learn whether GTA 6 holds its November 19 date or slips again.

items.title: Online Mode May Not Arrive Alongside the Main Game
items.summary: GameSpot notes history suggests GTA 6's still-unannounced online mode likely won't be available at launch, mirroring the rollout of GTA Online years ago.

items.title: Xbox Players Can Now Download a 328 MB GTA 6 Placeholder
items.summary: A 328 MB GTA 6 placeholder has appeared in Xbox libraries, the game's first official presence in console storefronts ahead of the November 2026 launch.

items.title: May 26: The Original Release Date That Never Was
items.summary: The record-breaking second trailer once pegged May 26, 2026 as launch day before Rockstar delayed again. With marketing quiet, all eyes turn to the next trailer and the May 21 earnings call.

items.title: Sony Targets PS4 Holdouts With GTA 6 Wishlists
items.summary: Sony is pushing GTA 6 wishlists to PlayStation 4 owners with heavy GTA V playtime, nudging them to upgrade to a PS5 before launch.
